description_long: This is a slim, cylindrical bottle with a blue exterior featuring prominent Pepsi branding, including the iconic red, white, and blue logo and large white text. The bottle appears to be made of metal, likely aluminum, with a matte silver cap at the top. Nutritional information and additional text are visible on the reverse side, printed in white against the blue background. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. The bottle is lightweight and designed for single-hand use, typical for soft drink containers. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the cap is a standard screw type.
description: A slim, blue Pepsi-branded aluminum bottle with a silver screw cap and smooth, glossy surface. Features prominent logo and nutritional text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Pepsi logo and bold white text on a blue background.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the bottle's slim cylindrical shape and partial logo.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional information and additional text in white.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the bottle's curvature and partial branding.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'PEPSI' text and the red, white, and blue Pepsi logo on the front; nutritional information and additional text in white on the back; all branding is printed on a blue background.
